mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TX_IO_LOG ( LOG_ID, GUID, TRACE_ID, BUSINESS_CODE, SERVICE_ID, TRANSACTION_CODE, SYSTEM_DATE, RESULT_STATUS, RESULT_CODE, ERROR_CODE, ELAPSED_TIME_MS, RECORD_TIME, IN_SYSTEM_ID, IN_BUSINESS_CODE, IN_SERVICE_ID, IN_TRANSACTION_CODE, IN_PROCESSING_TYPE, IN_GUID, IN_TRACE_ID, IN_CHANNEL_ID, IN_USER_ID, IN_BRANCH_ID, IN_CENTER_ID, IN_CLIENT_IP, IN_REQUEST_TIME, IN_RESPONSE_TIME, IN_TRANSACTION_INTIME, IN_TRANSACTION_OUTTIME, IN_SYSTEM_DATE, IN_BIZ_DATE, IN_AP_ID, OUT_SYSTEM_ID, OUT_BUSINESS_CODE, OUT_SERVICE_ID, OUT_TRANSACTION_CODE, OUT_PROCESSING_TYPE, OUT_GUID, OUT_TRACE_ID, OUT_CHANNEL_ID, OUT_USER_ID, OUT_BRANCH_ID, OUT_CENTER_ID, OUT_CLIENT_IP, OUT_REQUEST_TIME, OUT_RESPONSE_TIME, OUT_TRANSACTION_INTIME, OUT_TRANSACTION_OUTTIME, OUT_SYSTEM_DATE, OUT_BIZ_DATE, OUT_AP_ID ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{guid}, #{traceId}, #{businessCode}, #{serviceId}, #{transactionCode}, #{systemDate}, #{resultStatus}, #{resultCode}, #{errorCode}, #{elapsedTimeMs}, #{recordTime}, #{inSystemId}, #{inBusinessCode}, #{inServiceId}, #{inTransactionCode}, #{inProcessingType}, #{inGuid}, #{inTraceId}, #{inChannelId}, #{inUserId}, #{inBranchId}, #{inCenterId}, #{inClientIp}, #{inRequestTime}, #{inResponseTime}, #{inTransactionIntime}, #{inTransactionOuttime}, #{inSystemDate}, #{inBizDate}, #{inApId}, #{outSystemId}, #{outBusinessCode}, #{outServiceId}, #{outTransactionCode}, #{outProcessingType}, #{outGuid}, #{outTraceId}, #{outChannelId}, #{outUserId}, #{outBranchId}, #{outCenterId}, #{outClientIp}, #{outRequestTime}, #{outResponseTime}, #{outTransactionIntime}, #{outTransactionOuttime}, #{outSystemDate}, #{outBizDate}, #{outApId} )
mapper.sql: LOG_ID AS "logId", GUID AS "guid", TRACE_ID AS "traceId", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", SYSTEM_DATE AS "systemDate", RESULT_STATUS AS "resultStatus", RESULT_CODE AS "resultCode", ERROR_CODE AS "errorCode", ELAPSED_TIME_MS AS "elapsedTimeMs", RECORD_TIME AS "recordTime", IN_SYSTEM_ID AS "inSystemId", IN_BUSINESS_CODE AS "inBusinessCode", IN_SERVICE_ID AS "inServiceId", IN_TRANSACTION_CODE AS "inTransactionCode", IN_PROCESSING_TYPE AS "inProcessingType", IN_GUID AS "inGuid", IN_TRACE_ID AS "inTraceId", IN_CHANNEL_ID AS "inChannelId", IN_USER_ID AS "inUserId", IN_BRANCH_ID AS "inBranchId", IN_CENTER_ID AS "inCenterId", IN_CLIENT_IP AS "inClientIp", IN_REQUEST_TIME AS "inRequestTime", IN_RESPONSE_TIME AS "inResponseTime", IN_TRANSACTION_INTIME AS "inTransactionIntime", IN_TRANSACTION_OUTTIME AS "inTransactionOuttime", IN_SYSTEM_DATE AS "inSystemDate", IN_BIZ_DATE AS "inBizDate", IN_AP_ID AS "inApId", OUT_SYSTEM_ID AS "outSystemId", OUT_BUSINESS_CODE AS "outBusinessCode", OUT_SERVICE_ID AS "outServiceId", OUT_TRANSACTION_CODE AS "outTransactionCode", OUT_PROCESSING_TYPE AS "outProcessingType", OUT_GUID AS "outGuid", OUT_TRACE_ID AS "outTraceId", OUT_CHANNEL_ID AS "outChannelId", OUT_USER_ID AS "outUserId", OUT_BRANCH_ID AS "outBranchId", OUT_CENTER_ID AS "outCenterId", OUT_CLIENT_IP AS "outClientIp", OUT_REQUEST_TIME AS "outRequestTime", OUT_RESPONSE_TIME AS "outResponseTime", OUT_TRANSACTION_INTIME AS "outTransactionIntime", OUT_TRANSACTION_OUTTIME AS "outTransactionOuttime", OUT_SYSTEM_DATE AS "outSystemDate", OUT_BIZ_DATE AS "outBizDate", OUT_AP_ID AS "outApId"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TX_IO_LOG WHERE GUID = #{guid} ORDER BY RECORD_TIME DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM TX_IO_LOG
ORDER BY RECORD_TIME DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
